title: Authority of department of public works to contract with the United States
doc_html:
§86.  Authority of department of public works to contract with the United States

The department of public works, as principal for the state and as agent for any municipality or parish when authorized in writing, may contract with the United States or its subdivisions as required in connection with a grant or loan of federal funds for airport or air navigation facilities.
doc_text:
§86.  Authority of department of public works to contract with the United States
The department of public works, as principal for the state and as agent for any municipality or parish when authorized in writing, may contract with the United States or its subdivisions as required in connection with a grant or loan of federal funds for airport or air navigation facilities.
